title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 541.100 - Wounded in another state and dying in this
text:
541.100.  Wounded in another state and dying in this. — If any such wound or mortal injury shall have been inflicted in another state on any human being who shall die thereof within this state, an indictment may be found and a trial and conviction thereon had, in the county in which the death happened, in all respects as if the wound or injury had been inflicted in such county.
(RSMo 1939 § 3772) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3382; 1919 § 3727; 1909 § 4938
